title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 91.510 - Salaries and expenses — how paid
text:
91.510.  Salaries and expenses — how paid. — All bills of such board and all salaries of its employees shall be allowed and paid in the same manner that bills and salaries of other officers and employees of such city are allowed and paid.
(RSMo 1939 § 7802) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7657; 1919 § 9095; 1909 § 9920
